---
title: "W. Jonas Reger"
image: "assets/images/profile.jpg"
about:
  template: "solana"
---

My name is Jonas. I am a Graduate Student studying Data Science within the Statistics Department at the University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign (UIUC). I taught Statistics and Data Science in various roles as a Teaching Assistant and Instructor in university courses as well as research and education programs for equity, diversity, and inclusion for students of diverse backgrounds.

I am a self-taught programmer of 15+ years with great interests of applying computational skills to diverse fields related to Data Science. While my general interests extends broadly across Data Science, **my core interests are Natural Language Processing and Machine Learning**.

```{r, eval=FALSE}
print("IT'S ME")
```

```{r, echo=FALSE}
print("I'M THE PROBLEM, IT'S ME")
```

# Experience

**Sandia National Laboratories** \| Albuquerque, NM

R&D Graduate Virtual Intern \| MARTIANS Program \| May 2022 --- Aug 2022

**Discovery Partners Institute, University of Illinois at Chicago** \| Chicago, IL

Data Science Lead Virtual Instructor \| Digital Scholars Program \| May 2021 --- Aug 2021

**University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign** \| Champaign, IL

Teaching Assistant \| Statistics Department \| Jan 2019 --- Current

# Education

**University of Illinois at Urbana-Champaign** \| Champaign, IL

MS in Statistics \| May 2023

BS in Statistics, Minor in Mathematics \| May 2021

**Parkland College** \| Champaign, IL

AS in Computer Science \| May 2018
